title: Chapter 30
text: ACKNOWLEDGMENTS This book might not exist without my friend Felicia O’Sullivan, who must have read what felt like a hundred drafts of the first 30,000 to 80,000 words with no resolution in sight, and who was encouraging and enthusiastic and helped me figure out what I was trying to do. This book would not be in your hands without editor Lee Harris, publisher Irene Gallo, jacket designer Christine Foltzer, editorial assistant Matt Rusin, the copyeditors and proofreaders, and the rest of the Tordotcom team, especially Mordicai, Desirae, and Renata. This book would not be nearly as lovely without cover artist Cynthia Sheppard and map artist Rhys Davies. And I would not still be writing without my agent, Jennifer Jackson, and Michael Curry.
